decisions.decision: DRD Harness is standalone and consumes PRD; it does not modify PRD.
Deductive reasoning is primary; inductive reasoning is secondary.
PRD explicit elements are validated before adoption.
All clickable elements require interaction closure.
Information presentation is consistent by intent, trigger, scope and lifecycle.
Figma compatibility is required; Figma renderer is excluded.
DRD-05 compilation is deterministic Python; Codex only performs read-only QA afterward.
P1-P4 each contain SPEC and IMPLEMENT lanes.
Business skills are generated only after applicable specs are locked.
